Name: Dual Grit Whetstone with Rubber Base LKWTS20001-11
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • Made from white-fused aluminum oxide and available in all grits. Being a dual-side whetstone allows you to accompany a fine grit polishing side with a 1000-grit sharpening side all in one stone.
    • \n
  • The kit has four more gadgets available for purchase, individually or in a bundle. That includes necessary maintenance tools such as flattening stone, as well as rubber base, angle guide, and a leather strop.
    • \n
  • The whetstone is up for brand customizations. Options include custom packaging, logo engravings, etc.
    • \n

Name: Dual Grit Whetstone Plus Kit LKWTS20012
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • A fully-fledged professional sharpening kit incorporated with all the necessary tools and beyond. Including protection devices and advanced sharpening guides, leather strop, etc.
    • \n
  • The kit features two aluminum oxide dual-side water stones in 400, 1000, 3000, and 8000 grits.
    • \n
  • All tools included in this set support our private label service. We are able to design your logos onto the products.
    • \n

Name: Dual Grit Whetstone LKWTS20013-14
Short description:
\n

Key Features

\n
    \n
  • Made from brown-fused aluminum oxide - a more coarse material compared to its white-fused counterpart. The whetstone is available in two grit combos: 120/240 or 180/320.
    • \n
  • A plastic base can be bought separately with the whetstone. It can be used as a station to fix the whetstone, preventing it from slipping.
    • \n
  • Obtainable in two sizes. 8 inches for large and 6 inches for small. Long blades like Yanagiba will require a larger whetstone, while the small size will suffice for utility knives or pocket knives.
    • \n
\n

Name: Single Grit Whetstone with Rubber Base LKWTS20015-17
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • Available from standard sharpening grade to polishing grade, you can choose to purchase this whetstone in 1000, 2000, or 3000 grit options.
    • \n
  • The sample includes a non-slip rubber base alongside the whetstone. Users can set the stone onto the base to create a fixed sharpening station.
    • \n
  • It’s a heavy stone that weighs 2.2 pounds. Approximately 8 inches long and 3 inches wide: room for customization such as logo engravings.
    • \n

Name: Single Grit Diamond Whetstone LKWTS20018-21
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • This diamond sharpening plate is available in four different grit. Choose from 400, 600, 1000, and 1200 options wisely to fit your customer’s needs.
    • \n
  • Diamond whetstone is aggressive and can sharpen dull edges at a much faster pace. Sharpeners are advised to learn and hone their basic skills before using.
    • \n
  • Like other sharpening stones listed in this catalog. Diamond whetstone uses water as the standard cutting fluid during sharpening sessions.
    • \n

Name: Dual Grit Multipurpose Axe Whetstone LKWTS20022-25
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • The thick, multipurpose whetstone sharpens axes, kitchen knives, pocket knives, and even sharp objects like tableware.
    • \n
  • Dual-grit means the whetstone has two side features with different grit options for different sharpening purposes.
    • \n
  • Grit levels are determined by the material used: The brown-fused aluminum oxide features coarse 320/600 grit; silicon carbide has a slightly finer grit of 400/1000; and the 1000/6000 polishing grit white-fused aluminum oxide will offer.
    • \n

Name: Flattening Stone LKWTS20026-27
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • Made from industrial silicon carbide. The flattening stone has two grit levels available for purchase including 60 and 120 grit.
    • \n
  • This flattening stone is used on worn-out whetstones that have an uneven surface. It can not be used directly to sharpen knives.
    • \n
  • When flattening a sharpening stone with this product, water should be applied to give traction.
    • \n

Name: Dual Grit Whetstone with Plastic Base LKWTS20028-29
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • The whetstone has two sides in different coarse grits. Made from green silicon carbide, they are good for sharpening damaged knives or knives in a very dull state.
    • \n
  • Plastic base is a must for whetstone use that keeps the stone from moving uncontrollably. You can choose a green or orange plastic base coming in with this product.
    • \n
  • The whetstone weighs 0.73 lb, and water is the most efficient fluid for lubricant.
    • \n
